From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**Luga** may refer to:

* [Mateo Noriel Luga](/wiki/Mateo_Noriel_Luga "Mateo Noriel Luga"), Ibanag revolutionary
* [Luga, Germany](/w/index.php?title=Luga,_Germany&action=edit&redlink=1 "Luga, Germany (page does not exist)"), a place in [Saxony](/wiki/Saxony "Saxony"), Germany
* [Luga, Russia](/wiki/Luga,_Russia "Luga, Russia"), several inhabited localities in Russia
* [Luga Bay](/wiki/Luga_Bay "Luga Bay"), a bay in the Gulf of Finland, Russia
* [Luga (river)](/wiki/Luga_(river) "Luga (river)"), a river in Novgorod and Leningrad Oblasts, Russia
* Luga language, alternative name of the [Lungga language](/wiki/Lungga_language "Lungga language"), a Malayo-Polynesian language spoken in the Solomon Islands
* [21919 Luga](/wiki/21919_Luga "21919 Luga"), a main-belt asteroid
* [Luga (crater)](/wiki/Luga_(crater) "Luga (crater)"), a [crater on Mars](/wiki/List_of_craters_on_Mars:_H-N "List of craters on Mars: H-N")
